normalized_title: Development Control Policy 1.10 Freeway Service Centres and Roadhouses, including Signage
scope_summary: Guides WAPC and local government decision-making on the location, siting and design (including signage) of freeway service centres on freeways and roadhouses on other State roads in Western Australia. It applies when considering scheme amendments, structure plans and development applications for such facilities, and does not apply to ordinary service stations. It supersedes DC 1.10 - Location and Design of Freeway Service Centres (August 2001).

key_numeric_standards.topic: minimum spacing between freeway service centres and similar existing/approved facilities on a freeway
number of pylon signs (single multi-tenancy sign to avoid visual clutter)
